/usr/bin/ar qc libAtlasEngine.a CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/src/AtlasEngine_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Rendering/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Rendering/RenderViewport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Input/InputContextManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/AssetPipeline/AssetNamingRules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/AssetPipeline/AssetImportValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Physics/PhysicsWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Physics/PhysicsExtensions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Audio/AudioEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Audio/AudioSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Networking/NetSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Scripting/ScriptingVM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Config/KeybindConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/SaveLoad/SaveLoadExtensions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/AssetPipeline/AssetImportRules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/PCG/PCGDeterminismEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Config/SchemaVersionRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Scene/SceneNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Scene/SceneGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtlasEngine.dir/Scene/SceneManager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libAtlasEngine.a
